title: Core image downloading logic is still missing (Iteration 3)
description: Previous finding F-0001 stated that core image downloading logic is missing. Despite multiple review iterations, the provided code still only focuses on the management and passing of `StoredImageAttachment` and `ImageAttachmentStore`. There is still no implementation for extracting image URLs from `PrReviewData` or downloading them from GitHub. The core requirement of the user request remains unaddressed.
suggestion: Implement the logic to extract image URLs from `PrReviewData` (body, comments, reviews) and a service to download these images using GitHub authentication (e.g., `gh api` or authenticated requests) to save them as `StoredImageAttachment`.
